zh.Scrooby, Nottinghamshire, England: 英國諾廷加姆爾史盧比
zh.lifeSummary: 當Patience Brewster於大約1600年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾史盧比時，她的父親William Brewster36歲，母親Mary33歲。她於1624年8月5日與Thomas Prence在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1634年12月12日在美國麻薩諸塞州普萊姆斯普萊姆斯享年35歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Patience Brewster于大约1600年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾史盧比时，她的父亲William Brewster36岁，母亲Mary33岁。她于1624年8月5日与Thomas Prence在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1634年12月12日在美国马萨诸塞州普萊姆斯普萊姆斯享年35岁。

nameMeanings.name: Brewster
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a brewer of beer or ale, from Middle English brewestere, browestere ‘(female) brewer’ (from Old English brēowan ‘to brew’). Brewer is the usual term in southern England, while Brewster is mainly midland, northern, and Scottish.

History: The Mayflower Pilgrim William Brewster (1567–1644) was the son of the bailiff of the manor of Scrooby, Nottinghamshire, home of one of the earliest Puritan congregations. He was a prominent leader in Plymouth Colony from the 1620s until his death.

variants.name: Brewer
meanings: English: occupational name for a brewer of beer or ale, from Middle English brewere ‘brewer’ (an agent derivative of Old English brēowan ‘to brew’). Compare Brewster .
English (of Norman origin): Anglicized form of French Bruyère (see Bruyere ), a habitational name from a place so called in Calvados, France, from Old French bruiere ‘heath’.
Americanized form (translation into English) of Dutch   Brouwer  , German   Brauer   or   Breuer  , etc., all occupational names meaning ‘brewer’.

variants.name: Bruster
meanings: Swiss German: variant of the topographic name Brust 2, the suffix -er denoting an inhabitant.

nameMeanings.name: Patience
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the vocabulary word denoting one of the Seven Christian Virtues. The vocabulary word is derived from Latin pati ‘to suffer’, and was associated by the early Christians with those who endured persecution and misfortune without complaint or loss of faith. It was a favourite with the Puritans, but fell out of regular use in the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Patience Brewster was born about 1600, in Scrooby, Nottinghamshire, England, her father, William Brewster, was 36 and her mother, Mary, was 33. She married Thomas Prence on 5 August 1624, in Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died on 12 December 1634, in Plymouth, Plymouth, Massachusetts, United States, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Patience Brewster est née environ 1600, à Scrooby, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, William Brewster, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Mary, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Prence le 5 août 1624, à Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 12 décembre 1634, à Plymouth, Plymouth, Massachusetts, États-Unis, à l’âge de 35 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Patience Brewster è nata il circa 1600 nel Scrooby, Nottinghamshire, England, sua padre, William Brewster, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Mary, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Prence il 5 agosto 1624, nel Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 12 dicembre 1634, nel Plymouth, Plymouth, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 35 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Patience Brewsterが約1600年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアスクルービーで生まれた時，父William Brewsterは36歳，母Maryは33歳であった。1624年8月5日にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーでThomas Prenceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1634年12月12日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州プリモウスプリモウスで35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Patience Brewster(이)가 대략 1600년 영국 노틴그함실르 스크루비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Brewster(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1624년 8월 5일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이에서 Thomas Prence(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1634년 12월 12일 미국 매사추세츠 주 플림우스 플림우스에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Patience Brewster nasceu aproximadamente 1600, em Scrooby, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Brewster, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Mary, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Prence em 5 de agosto de 1624, em Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 12 de dezembro de 1634, em Plymouth, Plymouth, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América, com 35 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Patience Brewster родилась около 1600 г. в местности скруби, ноттингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Brewster было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Prence 5 августа 1624 г. в местности плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла 12 декабря 1634 г. в местности плимоут, плимоут, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 35 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Patience Brewster nació aproximadamente 1600, en Scrooby, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Brewster, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Mary, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Thomas Prence el 5 de agosto de 1624, en Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 12 de diciembre de 1634, en Plymouth, Plymouth, Masachusets, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 35 años.
